content.problemStatement:

F(0)=XF(0) = XF(0)=X

content.inputFormat:
The first line of the input contains four space-separated integers XXX, KKK, MMM and NNN.
The second line contains KKK space-separated integers S1,S2,‚Ä¶,SKS_1, S_2, \ldots, S_KS1‚Äč,S2‚Äč,‚Ä¶,SK‚Äč.
